name: erlotinib
target_rationale: EGFR WT/L858R sensitizing inhibitor; fails on T790M

name: gefitinib
target_rationale: EGFR WT/L858R sensitizing inhibitor; fails on T790M

name: osimertinib
target_rationale: 3rd-gen covalent (Cys797) EGFR-TKI engineered to hold on T790M

name: sotorasib
target_rationale: Covalent Cys12 KRAS G12C inhibitor (approved)

name: adagrasib
target_rationale: Covalent Cys12 KRAS G12C inhibitor (approved)

name: afatinib
target_rationale: 2nd-gen covalent (Cys797) pan-HER inhibitor, approved EGFR-mutant NSCLC

name: dacomitinib
target_rationale: 2nd-gen irreversible EGFR-TKI; bound in our locked T790M structure 4I24

name: lapatinib
target_rationale: Reversible dual EGFR/HER2 inhibitor, approved (breast cancer)

name: vandetanib
target_rationale: Reversible EGFR/VEGFR2/RET inhibitor, approved (thyroid cancer)

name: neratinib
target_rationale: Irreversible pan-HER covalent inhibitor, approved (breast cancer)

name: divarasib
target_rationale: Covalent Cys12 KRAS G12C inhibitor, clinical-stage (RG6330)

name: sunitinib
target_rationale: Multi-target RTK inhibitor, approved (renal cell carcinoma, GIST)

name: sorafenib
target_rationale: Multi-target RTK/RAF inhibitor, approved (renal, liver, thyroid cancer)

name: imatinib
target_rationale: BCR-ABL/KIT/PDGFR inhibitor, approved (CML, GIST)

name: crizotinib
target_rationale: ALK/ROS1/MET inhibitor, approved (NSCLC, different driver)

name: dasatinib
target_rationale: Multi-target kinase inhibitor, approved (CML)

name: ponatinib
target_rationale: Pan-BCR-ABL multi-kinase inhibitor, approved (CML)

name: metformin
target_rationale: AMPK activation indirectly suppresses KRAS/mTOR signaling (epidemiological/computational only)

name: simvastatin
target_rationale: Blocks KRAS prenylation via farnesyl pyrophosphate depletion

name: disulfiram
target_rationale: Cu-mediated covalent binding to KRAS cysteine residues, disrupts GTP binding

name: aspirin
target_rationale: Proposed covalent acetylation of a KRAS switch-II cysteine (RepoRx computational docking claim, untested against G12C-mutant structure)

name: itraconazole
target_rationale: Proposed KRAS-GLI1/hedgehog axis disruption (RepoRx repurposing-screen claim)

name: cimetidine
target_rationale: Proposed histamine-RAS-ERK axis inhibition (RepoRx pharmacovigilance/screen claim)

name: doxycycline
target_rationale: Proposed KRAS/ERK2 and EMT inhibition via MMP blockade (RepoRx repurposing-screen claim)

name: propranolol
target_rationale: Originally proposed by RepoRx against ERK2 (not in our scope); included here to test for an unanticipated EGFR/KRAS hit

name: thalidomide
target_rationale: Originally proposed by RepoRx against ERK2 (not in our scope); included here to test for an unanticipated EGFR/KRAS hit

name: verapamil
target_rationale: Originally proposed by RepoRx against ERK2 (not in our scope); included here to test for an unanticipated EGFR/KRAS hit
